test_cases.scenario: Scenario 1: TerminalComponent uses next/dynamic import in terminal/page.tsx
test_cases.evidence: terminal/page.tsx contains: import dynamic from 'next/dynamic'; const TerminalComponent = dynamic(() => import('@/components/Terminal').then((mod) => ({ default: mod.TerminalComponent })), { ssr: false, loading: ... })

test_cases.scenario: Scenario 2: MarkdownEditor uses next/dynamic import in WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx
test_cases.evidence: WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx contains: import dynamic from 'next/dynamic'; const MarkdownEditor = dynamic(() => import('@/components/worktree/MarkdownEditor').then((mod) => ({ default: mod.MarkdownEditor })), { ssr: false, loading: ... })

test_cases.scenario: Scenario 3: Loading indicators implemented with Loader2 and appropriate themes
test_cases.evidence: terminal/page.tsx: Loader2 imported from lucide-react, loading component with bg-gray-900 theme and 'Loading terminal...' text. WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx: Loader2 imported from lucide-react, loading component with bg-white theme and 'Loading editor...' text.

test_cases.scenario: Scenario 4: Static import of TerminalComponent removed
test_cases.evidence: grep for 'import { TerminalComponent } from' in terminal/page.tsx returned no matches. Git diff confirms removal of: import { TerminalComponent } from '@/components/Terminal'

test_cases.scenario: Scenario 5: Static import of MarkdownEditor removed
test_cases.evidence: grep for 'import { MarkdownEditor } from' in WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx returned no matches. Git diff confirms removal of: import { MarkdownEditor } from '@/components/worktree/MarkdownEditor'
npx tsc --noEmit completed with exit code 0 and no output (0 errors)
npm run lint output: 'No ESLint warnings or errors'

test_cases.scenario: Scenario 8: All unit tests pass (4411+ tests)
test_cases.evidence: npm run test:unit: 209 test files passed, 4411 tests passed, 7 skipped, 0 failed. Duration: 13.78s

npm run build completed successfully. Build output shows: /worktrees/[id] = 194 kB First Load JS, /worktrees/[id]/terminal = 100 kB First Load JS (TerminalComponent and MarkdownEditor code-split into separate chunks)

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: /worktrees/[id] page First Load JS reduced by MarkdownEditor dynamic import
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: Build output shows /worktrees/[id] = 194 kB First Load JS. MarkdownEditor (with highlight.js) is now loaded on-demand via dynamic import, not included in the initial bundle.
TerminalComponent uses dynamic import with ssr: false, preventing xterm.js browser API access during SSR. Build succeeded without errors. Terminal page First Load JS is only 100 kB.

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: Terminal displays loading indicator before xterm.js loads
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: Loading component renders Loader2 spinner with animate-spin class, bg-gray-900 terminal theme, and 'Loading terminal...' text. Verified by TerminalPage.test.tsx tests.

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: Markdown preview syntax highlighting works correctly
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: MarkdownEditor is dynamically imported with .then() pattern preserving named export. highlight.js/rehype-highlight loaded client-side only. 64 MarkdownEditor unit tests all pass.

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: All unit tests pass (npm run test:unit)
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: 4411 tests passed across 209 test files, including new tests: TerminalPage.test.tsx (9 tests), dynamic-import-patterns.test.ts (14 tests)

message: All acceptance criteria are satisfied. Both TerminalComponent (xterm.js) and MarkdownEditor (highlight.js) have been converted to next/dynamic imports with ssr: false, loading indicators using Loader2, and the .then() pattern for named exports. Static imports have been removed. TypeScript compilation, ESLint, all 4411 unit tests, and production build all pass successfully.
